title: Bee Removal in Merrick, NY | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Merrick, Long Island. Safe, humane bee hive removal from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: Dealing with a bee infestation in Merrick? Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, professional bee removal services throughout this beautiful Long Island community. Our experienced technicians handle everything from honeybee swarms to aggressive hive removal, protecting your family and property while preserving these important pollinators whenever possible.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Merrick homeowners and businesses, we understand the unique challenges of bee control in Long Island's suburban settings. Our licensed specialists use humane removal techniques, offer same-day emergency service, and provide competitive pricing from $350-$550 with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Merrick's tree-lined streets, beautiful colonial homes, and proximity to waterways like Merrick Bay create ideal conditions for bee colonies in attics, chimneys, and yard structures. From the historic Merrick Road corridor to neighborhoods near Cammann's Pond Park, we've helped countless residents safely remove unwanted bee nests from their properties.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Merrick typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the hive location, size, and accessibility. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Do you remove bees humanely?
faqs.answer: Yes! Whenever possible, we use live bee removal and relocation methods to preserve honeybee colonies. Our technicians are trained in humane extraction techniques and work with local beekeepers to relocate hives when appropriate, only using extermination as a last resort for dangerous situations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee problem in Merrick?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency bee removal services throughout Merrick and surrounding Long Island areas. If you're dealing with an aggressive swarm or hive near high-traffic areas, we prioritize your call and typically arrive within 2-4 hours during business hours.

faqs.question: What types of bees do you remove in Merrick?
faqs.answer: We handle all bee species common to Long Island, including honeybees, carpenter bees, bumblebees, and yellow jackets. Our team identifies the species, assesses the threat level, and uses the appropriate removal method for each situation, whether it's a small nest or a large established hive in your walls or attic.
